modules.name: Void Link Audio Send
modules.description: Publish a stereo audio stream over Ableton Link Audio. Interoperable with Live, TouchDesigner, Max, and any Link Audio host. Channel and peer name editable via right-click menu.

modules.name: Void Link Audio Receive
modules.description: Subscribe to a stereo audio stream over Ableton Link Audio. Interoperable with Live, TouchDesigner, Max, and any Link Audio host. Channel, peer filter and local peer name editable via right-click menu.
